blockingIssues.description: spec/command_line.md:6 still uses `try` naming; try→lab adaptation is incomplete.
spec/init_spec.md:25 still uses `try()` and `/path/to/try` examples; adaptation is incomplete.
spec/test_spec.md:39 still references `./try`; copied spec documentation was not fully adapted.
src/cli.rs does not use clap derive macros as required by feature scope/conventions.
src/cli.rs command parsing omits required top-level `cd` command.
src/fuzzy.rs applies density/length multipliers only to fuzzy_component, diverging from Ruby reference algorithm that multiplies total running score.
src/commands/init.rs shell detection does not fall back to parent process name when SHELL is unset, causing wrong snippet emission in fish scenarios.
src/commands/clone.rs accepts unparseable URIs when custom_name is provided; unparseable URIs must error and exit 1.
src/commands/worktree.rs always emits script_worktree; non-git worktree invocations must emit mkdir-only script (no `worktree add` text).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit precedence rule: when Ruby reference behavior conflicts with validation-contract assertions, implement to validation-contract first and call out the divergence in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both clone-command and worktree-dot-shorthand reviews found decision churn tied to Ruby-parity guidance conflicting with contract assertions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make TDD/spec-run steps conditional for setup/scaffolding features where acceptance criteria explicitly state copied tests are expected to fail initially, and require explicit 'skipped by contract' reporting in verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: project-setup review observed scaffolding scope conflicting with rigid TDD/spec-test procedure; scoring-fuzzy-matching review flagged inconsistent procedure reporting.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a verification checklist note for bulk renames/copies: include both `spec/tests/*` and top-level `spec/*.md` files to avoid partial try→lab rename drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: project-setup passed local checks focused on spec/tests while top-level spec markdown files retained `try` references.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared guidance is stale because implementation now uses manual parsing and command-local key handling.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected-as-wrong: this milestone contract and AGENTS conventions require clap-based parsing; observation reflected implementation drift, not guidance error.

rejectedObservations.observation: clap derive convention mismatch should be documented as allowed exception.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected-as-wrong: reviewers confirmed clap derive omission is a blocking defect for this milestone, not an approved exception.

rejectedObservations.observation: Missing spec-test command in one worker handoff indicates skill mismatch.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected-as-duplicate: covered by the broader rust-worker procedure update recommendation on conditional spec runs and explicit skip reporting.

rejectedObservations.observation: Validation contract and shell spec test mismatch for non-git worktree behavior.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected-as-ambiguous-for-direct-application: requires orchestrator decision on whether to update contract, spec tests, or both.
